paper_record.title: Thermal stability of pair density wave in a $d$-wave altermagnetic superconductor
paper_record.abstract: We study finite-momentum superconductivity in a two-dimensional $d$-wave altermagnetic superconductor using a non-perturbative Monte Carlo approach beyond mean-field theory. We show that altermagnetism stabilizes a pair density wave (PDW) state without external magnetic fields and enables its survival at finite temperatures with robust phase coherence. Our results establish altermagnetism as a promising route to realizing thermally stable PDW superconductivity and identify clear thermodynamic and spectroscopic signatures.

one_sentence_summary.zh: 研究揭示了交错磁性（Altermagnetism）能够在无外磁场情况下稳定d波超导体中的对密度波（PDW）态，并使其在有限温度下保持鲁棒的相干性。
one_sentence_summary.en: The study demonstrates that altermagnetism can stabilize the pair density wave (PDW) state in d-wave superconductors without external magnetic fields and ensure its thermal stability.

problem.zh: 对密度波（PDW）态通常对热涨落和扰动极其敏感，难以在实际材料的有限温度下稳定存在。
problem.en: Pair density wave (PDW) states are typically extremely fragile against thermal fluctuations and perturbations, making them difficult to realize at finite temperatures in real materials.

approach.zh: 采用非微扰静态路径近似（SPA）蒙特卡罗方法结合变分平均场理论，研究二维吸引哈伯德模型中的交错磁性超导体。
approach.en: Used non-perturbative static path approximated (SPA) Monte Carlo combined with variational mean-field theory to study a 2D attractive Hubbard model for altermagnetic superconductors.

main_takeaway.zh: 交错磁性通过费米面拓扑结构的改变，不仅在基态稳定了PDW，还显著提升了其抵抗热涨落的能力，使其在有限温度下依然具有可观测的热力学和光谱特征。
main_takeaway.en: Altermagnetism stabilizes PDW by modifying Fermi surface topology, significantly enhancing its resistance to thermal fluctuations and providing clear thermodynamic and spectroscopic signatures at finite temperatures.

why_it_matters.zh: 为寻找和实现长期以来难以捉摸的PDW态提供了一条无需外磁场的新路径，并为交错磁性超导材料的实验探测提供了理论指导。
why_it_matters.en: It provides a new route to realize the elusive PDW state without external magnetic fields and offers theoretical guidance for experimental detection in altermagnetic superconducting materials.

reason.zh: 首次定量评估了交错磁性超导体中PDW态的热稳定性，并给出了明确的温度标度。
reason.en: First quantitative estimation of the thermal stability of the PDW state in altermagnetic superconductors with explicit temperature scales.

reason.zh: 交错磁性是当前凝聚态物理的热点，且文章解决了PDW稳定性这一长期存在的难题。
reason.en: Altermagnetism is a hot topic in condensed matter physics, and the paper addresses the long-standing problem of PDW stability.
